title: athanasia crithmifolia subsp. crithmifolia
intro: Athanasia crithmifolia subsp. crithmifolia, also known as Sea Spurge, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It is a succulent shrub that grows in coastal areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Athanasia crithmifolia subsp. crithmifolia can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb in herbal medicine.
